title: How the Bab al-Mandab blockade threat helped push oil back above $100
description: Escalating Houthi warnings to ships carrying Saudi crude through the strait lead to fears of further price surge
content:
A fresh front in the Middle East crisis opened this week, bringing a return of soaring global energy markets and stoking fears that the oil price could surge to $120 (£90) a barrel.

title: Decoding Charli XCX's new album, Music, Fashion, Film
description: The star's new album strips away artifice to examine her life after the phenomenal success of Brat.
content:
Charli XCX was supposed to be taking a break.
Her sixth album, Brat, was the sort of record you could genuinely call era-defining, without being accused of overstating its significance.

title: They became best friends - then discovered they were brother and sister
description: Andrea Urmston knew she had a brother who had been adopted by another family, only to discover he was already her closest friend.
content:
Dave Green and Andrea Urmston found they instantly hit it off when their paths crossed while working in separate roles at Manchester Airport.

title: UK ‘ready to defend itself’ after Iranian threat over US bases
description: IRGC claims base in south-west England was used by US to launch bombing missions, making it ‘legitimate target’
content:
The government has said the UK is “ready to defend itself” after Iran’s military warned that any bases being used by the US were “legitimate targets”.

title: World Matchplay 2026: Luke Littler cruises into semi-finals with win over Josh Rock
description: World number one Luke Littler's World Matchplay title defence continues with a 16-7 quarter-final win over Josh Rock in Blackpool, as he averages 109.57.
content:
